data.body: USER_APPROVAL (2026-04-20): User directive — 'Fixes recommended by bot-psychologist are approved' for all Category D intent-confirmed clusters. Cluster C fix approved WITH REVIEW CAVEAT: proposed fixes assume /dso:review is non-existent skill — requires verification in next session before applying (/dso:review IS successfully invoked at this session's start, so the bot-psych analysis may be wrong for this specific repo). Safer fix: add fix-bug SKILL.md commit-path prohibition on Skill("review") to force explicit REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md inline read.
